gif_init.tooltip: Initialize AnimatedGIF player object, requires TFT display

gif_open_memory.message0: GIF %1 open memory data header %2 array %3
gif_open_memory.tooltip: Open GIF data from memory (FLASH), specify the header file and array name containing GIF data, and display position

gif_open_sd.tooltip: Open GIF file from SD card, specify file path and display position

gif_play_frame.tooltip: Play one frame of GIF animation, returns whether more frames remain. When sync is Yes, waits for frame delay

gif_play_all.tooltip: Play all frames of the GIF animation, continues to next block after completion

gif_close.tooltip: Close the currently open GIF file and release resources

gif_get_width.tooltip: Get the canvas width of the current GIF animation (pixels)

gif_get_height.tooltip: Get the canvas height of the current GIF animation (pixels)
